summary: Tested Open Enrollment Period Management feature. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly. Enrollment lock enforcement verified - employees cannot enroll/decline when enrollment is closed unless they have an approved exception.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning)

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/enrollment/periods - Create enrollment period (returns draft status)
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/periods/{employer_id} - List all periods with auto-close expired
Backend: PUT /api/enrollment/periods/{period_id} - Activate period (status: active)
Backend: PUT /api/enrollment/periods/{period_id} - Close period (status: closed)
Backend: DELETE /api/enrollment/periods/{period_id} - Delete draft period
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/periods/{employer_id}/active - Get active period for employee portal
Backend: POST /api/enrollment/exceptions - Employee requests exception (creates pending request)
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/exceptions/{employer_id} - List exception requests
Backend: PUT /api/enrollment/exceptions/{exception_id} - Approve exception (status: approved)
Backend: Enrollment lock enforcement - POST /api/enrollment/employee/enroll returns 403 when closed
Backend: Enrollment lock enforcement - POST /api/enrollment/employee/decline returns 403 when closed
Backend: Exception override - Employee with approved exception can enroll successfully
Frontend: Enrollment Review page loads with Enrollment Periods tab
Frontend: Enrollment Periods tab shows active period banner with countdown timer
Frontend: Enrollment Periods tab shows 'Enrollment Closed' banner when no active period
Frontend: All Enrollment Periods list displays periods with status badges (ACTIVE/CLOSED/DRAFT)
Frontend: Create Enrollment Period dialog works (period name, start date, end date inputs)
Frontend: Activate period button works - changes status to active
Frontend: Close period button works - changes status to closed
Frontend: Exception Requests section shows pending/approved/rejected exceptions
Frontend: Employee Portal shows 'Declined' status for employee who declined coverage
Frontend: Employee Portal shows profile details with Offer Code
critical_code_review_comments: Enrollment period CRUD endpoints properly implemented with status transitions (draft → active → closed)
Auto-close logic for expired active periods works correctly
Exception request flow properly integrated with enrollment lock enforcement
Frontend EnrollmentPeriodsTab component has all required data-testid attributes for testing
Employee Portal correctly shows enrollment closed state and exception request form
seed_data_creation: Created test employee via POST /api/enrollment/employee/register, created exception request, approved exception, enrolled employee in Silver PPO plan
context_for_next_testing_agent: Open Enrollment Period Management feature fully tested. Key points: (1) Enrollment periods have 3 statuses: draft, active, closed. (2) Only one active period allowed per employer. (3) Enrollment lock enforcement blocks enroll/decline when no active period exists (returns 403). (4) Employees can request exceptions, employers can approve/reject. (5) Approved exceptions bypass enrollment lock. (6) Frontend Enrollment Periods tab integrated into Enrollment Review page. (7) Employee Portal shows enrollment closed banner with exception request form when enrollment is closed.

enrollment_lock_enforcement.enroll_blocked: Returns 403 when no active period and periods exist
enrollment_lock_enforcement.decline_blocked: Returns 403 when no active period and periods exist

frontend_components.active_period_banner: Shows countdown timer and Close Now button
frontend_components.periods_list: Shows all periods with status badges
frontend_components.create_period_dialog: Period name, start date, end date inputs
